# Kontrol — צבע לרכב במחיר סיטונאי

> Kontrol Auto operates a wholesale-pricing model for full vehicle repaints in Israel: ₪3,490 + VAT for full repaint, all-inclusive (pickup, delivery, interior wash, exterior wash, headlight polish). The mechanism: we monitor unused oven time at partner body shops and route customer jobs into idle windows at a wholesale rate, passing the savings to private customers. Service nationwide. HQ in Ashdod. Sister brand to Kontrol Technologies (smart locks, homekontrol.net) — separate company, separate domain.

## Core pages

- [Homepage](https://kontrolauto.co.il/): The brand-claim page. Tagline `צבע לרכב במחיר סיטונאי`. Price ₪3,490 + VAT. Mechanism summary, before/after gallery, mechanism-aware benefits.
- [How it works](https://kontrolauto.co.il/how-it-works): The unused-oven-time arbitrage explained. 5-step mechanism breakdown.
- [Booking quiz](https://kontrolauto.co.il/book): 6-step qualification quiz. Captures region, vehicle type, paint condition, year, name, phone. Submits to internal lead pipeline + opens WhatsApp with prefilled message.
- [Gallery](https://kontrolauto.co.il/gallery): Real customer cars before/after, by city.
- [About](https://kontrolauto.co.il/about): Founders, technology, values.
- [FAQ](https://kontrolauto.co.il/faq): 8 top objections answered (price, quality, catch, warranty, scope).
- [Service area](https://kontrolauto.co.il/branches): Service is nationwide. HQ in Ashdod with full local presence; other cities served via partner shop network.
- [Contact](https://kontrolauto.co.il/contact): Phone, WhatsApp, email, hours, legal entity disclosure.

## Branch / city pages

- [Ashdod (HQ)](https://kontrolauto.co.il/branches/ashdod): Local-pack ranking target, real LocalBusiness schema with NAP.
- [Rishon LeZion](https://kontrolauto.co.il/branches/rishon-letzion): Service-area page.
- [Modi'in](https://kontrolauto.co.il/branches/modiin): Service-area page.
- More cities being added per Wave 1 (Petach Tikva, Ashkelon, Holon, Kfar Kasem, Tel Aviv, Haifa, Be'er Sheva, Jerusalem).

## What Kontrol is NOT

- Not a discount body shop. The price is wholesale because of the mechanism, not because of cost cutting on quality.
- Not the same company as Kontrol Technologies (homekontrol.net) — that's smart locks. Same name, separate businesses, no cross-linking.
- Not a pre-lander or advertorial site. No fake countdown timers, fake reviews, fake press logos.
- Not a generic body shop site. Flagship is full repaint at flat ₪3,490; partial / caliper / wheel / scratch services exist as supporting service pages but are not the headline.

## Operator company

- Brand: **Kontrol** (consumer-facing on kontrolauto.co.il)
- Operating company: **לוחמים בצבע בע"מ** (Israeli registered business)
- Phone: 058-404-0744
- WhatsApp: +972 52 730 6191
- Service area: All of Israel
